annotation.reason: Two parts: (a) Renamed the templates section to 'presets, not the bounding space' and added explicit text that lanes are unbounded + custom pipelines are first-class. (b) Added a new § CRUD support section covering lanes, groups, and pipelines; expanded studio rendering with a lane-visibility panel + many-lane overflow handling; added new Phase 5 for lane/pipeline CRUD skills + studio surfaces.
